name: Multi-Embed Aggregator
description: Aggregates video sources from multiple embed services (vidking, 1embed, 2embed, vidlink, vidsrc, embed.su) used by streaming aggregation sites.
author: ARVIO Community

name: Vidking Embed Scraper
description: Scrapes sources from Vidking.net embed player (used by cineby.at and others).
author: ARVIO Community

name: 1embed.cc Scraper
description: Scrapes sources from 1embed.cc embed player (used by bcine.ru and others).
author: ARVIO Community
